news.title: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
news.summary: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company. SpaceX is a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.

news.title: U.S.-Iran peace deal could be finalized 'in the next 24 hours,' Pakistan's PM says
news.summary: A senior Trump administration official had said earlier that deal to end the Iran war could be signed soon. A senior Obama administration official said earlier this week that a deal could be reached soon.

news.title: UAE denies 'false' reports of fund transfer to Iran
news.summary: The statement follows a Reuters report that the UAE has agreed to unlock billions of dollars of frozen funds for Iran. The report said the UAE would unlock the funds.

news.title: SpaceX IPO sticks the landing. Here's what investors are saying about its epic first trading day
news.summary: Despite a large retail allocation and huge volume, volatility was moderate. Despite a large Retail allocation and Huge Volume, Volatile Volatility was Moderate.

news.title: Moats vs. moonshots: The Warren Buffett-Elon Musk style debate
news.summary: Warren Buffett and Elon Musk indirectly debated a key question that persists for modern investors. In 2018, Warren Buffett and Elon Musk indirectly Debate a Key Question That persists for Modern Investors.

news.title: My elderly mother and I own a home together. Will Medicaid force its sale?
news.summary: “My sister thinks Medicaid will take the house my mom and I own together,” she says. “I’m not worried about that. I just want my mom to be able to keep her house.”

news.title: SpaceX employees now have enough wealth on paper to buy every home in this Texas city
news.summary: 2025 set an all-time high for first-time buyers who used financial assets to buy a home or fund a down payment, according to the National Association of Realtors.

news.title: I’m 55 and earn $100,000. Should I take a $2,900 monthly pension — or $2,200 with 3% annual hikes?
news.summary: “I plan to continue working until age 60,” he says. “I’m not going to stop when I’ve reached 60.”

news.title: The rich keep spending money on ‘unapologetic luxury’ — and it’s raising prices on everyday goods for everyone
news.summary: The wealthy are unfazed by inflation, and that could complicate the Fed’s ability to fight it. The wealthy are unafraid of inflation. The Fed is trying to keep inflation under control.

news.title: Defaults in debt markets are starting again, warns Pimco. Here’s the bond giant’s game plan.
news.summary: Pimco: Investors should increasingly seek out fixed income to anchor portfolios. Equity valuations look stretched, says Pimco. Investors should look to fixed income as an anchor for their portfolios.
